name: aarushi-memorial
description: aarushiguptamemorial.org — a memorial site for Aarushi Gupta and the family-funded education fund in her name. Static HTML, self-contained styles, no build framework.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html her.html fund.html apply.html CNAME robots.txt sitemap.xml dist/ && cp -r images dist/ && touch dist/.nojekyll
